generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for the permanent magnet synchronous motor in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionSensor
    base:desc "MQTT-based transmission of motor position data"
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time position data of the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance MabiMax100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 serial robot (6-axis) from MABI Robotic AG, first vertical axis at base driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor and cycloidal gear"
]

instance Sysml : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) using SysML for system modeling across multiple abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ControlAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance Acme : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component-and-connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAccuracyOptimizationService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

    base:desc "SysML IBD for component-and-connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAccuracyOptimizationService
]

    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for detailed behavior specification and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAccuracyOptimizationService
]

    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAccuracyOptimizationService
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo Sysml
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo Acme

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of mechanical parameters (e.g., friction) via data-driven identification and optimization of robot control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionIdentification, DashboardVisualization
]

instance ControlAccuracyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of robot control accuracy through derived friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalRelationshipUnderstanding
]

instance JointFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Joint friction identification through analytics processing"
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipUnderstanding : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Physical relationship understanding through analytics processing"
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualizations for real-time monitoring and decision support"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time processing of sensor data streams as time series for live measurements, with synchronization between physical and digital components requiring low-latency handling of continuous data flow; specific frequency or latency values are not quantified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow system's architecture comprises an Asset component representing the physical entity, a Model for digital representation, a Processing component that aggregates and abstracts data traces, and DataTrace for contextual data storage. These components integrate through one-way data flow where Processing consumes input data traces and produces output data for the Model."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is the communication protocol for network connectivity between physical and digital components. Details on network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems using Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as an interoperability standard, MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming, and connection to Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for industrial control."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes industry-standard modeling languages and architecture description languages (ADLs) such as SysML [17], ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26], and SysML IBDs [17,27], ensuring component-based system representation, interoperability, and integration of heterogeneous stakeholders' perspectives."
]
